title: tests: efinix: mux16 case in mux.ys fails due to wrong number of LUT4 on macOS
body:
**Environment:**
- macOS Sierra (10.12.6)
- clang (8.1.0)
- iverilog (7f95abc)
- Yosys (7dece795)

Yosys built using official instructions from Readme.

**Test run on macOS:**
```
cd tests/arch/efinix
bash run_test.sh
```
**Error log:**
```
Running mux.ys..
ERROR: Assertion failed: selection contains 11 elements instead of the asserted 12: t:EFX_LUT4
Selection contains:
mux16/$abc$653$auto$blifparse.cc:498:parse_blif$654
mux16/$abc$653$auto$blifparse.cc:498:parse_blif$655
mux16/$abc$653$auto$blifparse.cc:498:parse_blif$656
mux16/$abc$653$auto$blifparse.cc:498:parse_blif$657
mux16/$abc$653$auto$blifparse.cc:498:parse_blif$658
mux16/$abc$653$auto$blifparse.cc:498:parse_blif$659
mux16/$abc$653$auto$blifparse.cc:498:parse_blif$660
mux16/$abc$653$auto$blifparse.cc:498:parse_blif$661
mux16/$abc$653$auto$blifparse.cc:498:parse_blif$662
mux16/$abc$653$auto$blifparse.cc:498:parse_blif$663
mux16/$abc$653$auto$blifparse.cc:498:parse_blif$664
make: *** [run-mux.ys] Error 1
```

I also ran the test on Linux and the error did not occur.
In attached blif files you can see that indeed there is a difference in number of LUTs.

[blif_files.zip](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/3931483/blif_files.zip)
